ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-22-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kurt Yip for Antonio Ocampo.

The Court stated that everything is in order and that no one was here to object. The Court approved the Petition for Final Distribution (subject to review of the order). Status on filing of receipts for two individual blocked accounts was set for May 15, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Loos.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-06-2013 Continued To Mar-20-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-06-2013 Continued To Mar-06-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Peter Tamases for Antonio Ocampo.

Tha Petition for Final Distribution was continued to March 6, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to obtain consents from all 33 Beneficiaries to not recieving any interest and for filing of an amendment to reflect abatement. The Court allowed bond to be reduced to $280,000.00 (subject to receipt of an order). Counsel is to prepare said order.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.
